title: FPS+++
description: A simple, yet powerful, client-side optimization modpack.
body:
#  🚀 FPS+++: Get the Maximum Out of Your Minecraft!

Tired of lag and low FPS, especially when using other Forge mods? OptiForge is the definitive client-side solution to maximize your performance without altering the core vanilla gameplay experience. 
This modpack has been carefully curated to provide a significantly smoother experience on a wide range of systems, from low-end laptops that struggle with basic performance to high-end rigs looking to push past the 400 FPS mark. 

## ✨ Key Features:
Significant FPS Boost: Expect a noticeable increase in frame rates compared to standard vanilla Minecraft.
Faster Loading Times: Worlds load quicker, memory usage is optimized with mods like FerriteCore, and crashes are minimized.

Full Forge Compatibility: This pack is the ideal template for adding your own preferred mods, ensuring the optimization helps everything run better.
Pure Vanilla Experience: No new content is added; only essential, optimization-related mods are included. 


 **FPS+++**, 
 is the easiest way to optimize your Minecraft experience. Just install, launch, and feel the difference immediately!
 

### 🛠️ Core Mods Included:
(List your specific mods here, e.g., Embeddium, Rubidium, FerriteCore, Canary, etc.)
